diagrams.title: 8051 Interrupt Vector Table
diagrams.description: Memory map showing all interrupt vector addresses in ascending order
diagrams.purpose: Learn exact vector addresses and spacing for writing ISR jumpers

diagrams.title: IE Register Bit Layout
diagrams.description: 8-bit Interrupt Enable register with all bit positions and functions
diagrams.purpose: Visualize which bits to set for enabling specific interrupts

diagrams.title: Stack Operation During Interrupt
diagrams.description: Stack memory showing PC being pushed when interrupt occurs
elements: Stack grows upward (high to low addresses)
SP points to next free location or last pushed byte
diagrams.purpose: Understand automatic stack management in ISR entry

diagrams.title: Interrupt Priority Pyramid
diagrams.description: Hierarchical pyramid showing default priority order of 8051 interrupts
elements: IP register can modify this ordering
diagrams.purpose: Remember priority order for simultaneous interrupt handling
